description: A submittal for the HVAC unit model has been with the engineer for review for 15 days, exceeding the 10-day review period. The project manager needs to follow up.

nodes.task_description: Check the submittal log for the status of the 'HVAC Unit' submittal.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the submittal is 'Pending Approval' and has been outstanding for 15 days.

nodes.task_description: Send a follow-up reminder to the lead engineer requesting an update on the review status.

expected_outcome.value: A formal reminder notification is sent to the engineer.
